name: takomi-flow
description: Agent-first Google Flow browser automation for Codex and Takomi workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Google Flow from Codex through safe browser automation.
interface.longDescription: TakomiFlow gives Codex agents a reusable, local workflow for bootstrapping a Google Flow browser profile, smoke-checking access, preparing generation requests, and downloading Flow assets through the public UI with explicit spend guards.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use TakomiFlow to prepare or run a safe Google Flow browser workflow.
